sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sorted_strings (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR);
SELECT name FROM test_sorted_strings ORDER BY icu_sort_key(name, 'DE');
UPDATE test_sorted_strings SET name = 'äpfelchen' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, icu_sort_key(name, 'DE') AS sort_key FROM test_sorted_strings ORDER BY sort_key;
